name: zvid_texture_pack_load_state_getter
description: zVid::GetTexturePackLoadState returns the current texture-pack load-state global.
binary_safe_evidence: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare passed with zero unmasked mismatches after masking 4 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 6 bytes and the VC object body is 16 bytes with 10 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.
The native smoke verifies that zVid::GetTexturePackLoadState reads the current g_zVid_TexturePackLoadState value.
